subcodes.first_line: In this day two calls are raised: the first is the Call of the All-Merciful, and the second is the call of Satan. Those souls that hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز دو ندا مرتفع اول ندآء الرحمن و الثانی ندآء الشیطان نفوسیکه نزد اصغای
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
